blocks.body:
"^Verse"
E/2 D/2 ^F G/2 D/2 ^F |
w: 1. Bo- že můj, Bo- že můj,
z/2 ^F/2 A/2 G/2 ^F/2 D/2 B, |

^C/2 B,/2 ^C/2 D/2 ^C/2 D/2 E/2 D/2 E/2 |
w: Proč už mě ne- sly- šíš? Na te- be
^F/2 ^F z |

"^Chorus"
^F/2 E/2 ^F/2 G/2 ^F/2 E/2 ^F/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 |

^F/2 E/2 ^F/2 G/2 ^F/2 E/2 ^F/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 B,/2 B,/2 |

G/2 ^F/2 G/2 A/2 G/2 A/2 B/2 A/2 G/2 E/2 E/2 E/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 D/2 |
w: V te- be vždy dou- fa- li, v stí- nu tvém

w: skry- li se,
D/2 D/4 D/2 E/2 E/2 E/2 ^F/2 D/2 D/2 B,/2 B,/4 B,/2 ^C/2 ^C/2 ^C/2 A,/2 A,/2 A,/2 |

E ^F2 B, ^C2 |
